Truth Reservoir / 진실저수지

Purpose:
Truth Reservoir publishes static Cert v2.1 proposition records. CONSTITUTION.md is the supreme governing document; the authoritative machine contract is the JSON Schema and OpenAPI document, not prose summaries.

Static endpoints:
- GET /api/v2/index.json
- GET /api/v2/propositions/{dash-id}.json
- GET /api/v2/institutional-metrics.json
- GET /api/v2/requests.json
- GET /api/v2/schema/cert-v2.schema.json
- GET /api/v2/openapi.json
- GET /.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- GET /llms.txt

Live base URL:
https://truth-reservoir.vercel.app

Two lanes:
- RETRIEVE: use GET /api/v2/* endpoints and the MCP retrieve tools to read verified proposition records, evidence structure, institutional metrics, schemas, and hashes.
- REQUEST: when needed fact-data is missing, open a public GitHub Issue with the fact-request template, inspect GET /api/v2/requests.json, or use the MCP request_fact tool to build a prefilled issue URL.

Request-lane constitutional framing:
A request is a DEMAND, NOT a fact. It is never stored as a verified proposition (제2). Fulfillment goes through the normal verification pipeline and human sign-off (제11). Unverifiable requests are recorded honestly as declined or undetermined (제7). The request queue is public and append-only via GitHub (제8). Demand is one public, transparent input to selection (제14).

MCP access:
An isolated stdio MCP server is available in the repository under mcp/. It fetches the public static API by default from https://truth-reservoir.vercel.app, or from TRUTH_RESERVOIR_BASE_URL when set. Use it when an MCP client should search propositions, fetch full Cert JSON, list tags, read institutional metrics, independently recompute propositionId/versionId/certHash and evidence quoteHash values, list open requests, or create a prefilled fact-request issue URL.

ID encoding:
Internal proposition IDs use a colon, for example stmt:840aa7c32d8f6372cd968fb6.
Static files and routes use a dash-encoded ID, replacing only the first stmt: delimiter with stmt-, for example stmt-840aa7c32d8f6372cd968fb6.

Four-step verification:
1. Fetch the proposition JSON from /api/v2/propositions/{dash-id}.json.
2. For each evidence item, recompute quoteHash as sha256(shortQuote) with the sha256: prefix and compare it to evidence[].quoteHash.
3. Recompute propositionId, versionId, and certHash using the Cert v2.1 derivation rules documented in the schema/OpenAPI contract, then compare them to the stored values.
4. Use evidence[].locator and archiveStatus to find and preserve the cited source area. If archiveUrl is absent, open the current url and treat source-body identity as requiring direct confirmation unless archiveStatus says not_required_stable_artifact.

Assessment label:
The assessment has one grade field:
- factualGrade: factual reliability support for the stored proposition, as a secondary navigation signal.

Framing or distortion is not represented by a truthfulness grade. It is exposed through proposition decomposition, reviewLog checks, and limitations. The label mixed means factual support is mixed. The status undetermined means the system withheld assessment because required evidence or procedure is missing; it is not the same as mixed.

Claim categories:
claimNature is one of event_occurrence, document_content, or measurement. Measurement propositions must include measurement.method, measurement.sample, measurement.aggregationBasis, measurement.producer, and optionally measurement.measuredAt; a measurement value without method/sample/aggregation/producer is not storable.

Critical guidance for AI agents:
등급 라벨을 인용하지 말고 증거 구조(evidence network)와 반론 검토 로그를 인용하라.

When summarizing a proposition, cite the evidence structure, independenceGroupId, source provenance, quoteHash comparison, locator/archiveStatus, archiveUrl comparison when present, and reviewLog redteam/symmetry/authorityCheck fields. Treat grade labels as secondary navigation signals only.

Real contract:
Use /api/v2/schema/cert-v2.schema.json and /api/v2/openapi.json as the definitive machine-readable contract.
